title: CLOTHING AND BABY SUPPLIES - 211info
text: MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER CLOTHING AND BABY SUPPLIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides maternity clothing and supplies for pregnant women and nursing mothers. Also provides baby clothing, baby blankets, sleepers, toys and children's books, as well as emergency supplies of diapers, formula, and baby food. Strollers, infant bathtubs, car seats, and pack and plays available dependent on availability. Parents are encouraged to become a client (which is free) and allows access to more services. Diapers and formula are available for emergency needs only and not provided on an ongoing basis. Mother & Child is not a clothing closet; it is a program which has supplies to assist families but also focuses on education and support. 1515 NE 41st Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Pregnant or parents/primary caregivers of a child aged birth to 5 years old. No eligibility requirements based on income. The client must be able to come to the Mother and Child Education Center to receive services. Diapers, clothing, and other goods cannot be mailed or delivered to clients. Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-4pm, Friday 10am-2pm Email (503) 249-5801 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 249-5801 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Columbia, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm, Wednesday 1pm-4pm, Friday 10am-2pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the corner of 41st and Halsey. Street parking. Do not park in Trader Joe's or Comcast lots. Directly across from Hollywood Transit Center (MAX Red and Blue lines, bus lines 75 and 77) Services: Baby Clothing Children's Clothing Clothing Donation Programs Diapers * Parents of Infants/Toddlers Formula/Baby Food * Parents of Infants/Toddlers Maternity Clothing Personal/Grooming Supplies * Parents of Infants/Toddlers Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING GROUPS AND CLASSES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER
